title: poa × taurica
intro: Poa × taurica, also known as meadow-grass or blue oat grass, is a hybridized species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of digestive issues and inflammation, due to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Poa × taurica include its ability to soothe digestive problems, reduce inflammation, and protect against oxidative stress. This plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are traditionally consumed to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health issues.
